# Artemis Rental

> Family car and scooter rentals in Apollonia, Sifnos (Cyclades, Greece) since 1988.

- Site: https://rentacarsifnos.com
- Email: info@artemisrental.gr
- Phone: +30 22840 33333
- Mobile / WhatsApp: +30 698 590 8478
- Address: Apollonia, Sifnos 84003, Cyclades, Greece
- Geo: 36.9725097, 24.7239171
- Languages: English (en), Greek (el), Italian (it), French (fr), German (de), Swedish (sv), Dutch (nl)

## Services
- Car rental (manual and automatic)
- Scooter / motorcycle rental
- Pickup in Apollonia; Kamares on request
- No prepayment required to enquire
- Drivers aged 23–75 with licence held > 1 year

## AI assistants
- On-site Touristas AI chatbot answers fleet, rates, and Sifnos questions in all site languages
- Full Cyclades trip planner: https://discovercyclades.gr/en/touristas-ai/chat?island=sifnos
